mnemonics.title: POSIX Components
mnemonics.content:
Please Observe Standards In X:
P - Portable
O - Operating
S - System
I - Interface
X - (for Unix)

mnemonics.title: Standards Timeline
mnemonics.content:
1988: POSIX First (PFF)
1990s: SUS Second (SS)
IEEE: POSIX Parent (PP)
Open Group: SUS Supervisor (OSS)

mnemonics.title: SUS Components
mnemonics.content:
B-S-H-N: Big Standard Has Necessities
B - Base Definitions
S - System Interfaces
H - Shell and Utilities
N - Networking Services
